title: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
summary_full: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.
summary_public: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.
